uplink.description: data frame with GPS fix (TTN example bytes)
uplink._note: Upstream df702 example input. expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary by running reference/upstream-codec.js (lat 40.038999, lon 116.50743 = NE Beijing) and re-shaping: lat/lon -> position.*, temperature -> air.temperature, level -> fillDistanceMm extra, status flags as boolean extras, low-battery flag -> lowBattery (not vocabulary battery, which is volts).

uplink.description: synthetic data frame with GPS fix (San Francisco), bin full + low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds GPS frame. lon=-122.4194, lat=37.7749 encoded as 4-byte little-endian IEEE754 floats; expected.data computed by running the authored codec (round to 6 dp gives -122.41941 / 37.774899). fillDistance 1500 mm, temp 22 C, tilt sign nibble 0 -> +30 deg, full flag set, low-battery flag set.

uplink.description: data frame without GPS (TTN example bytes)
uplink._note: Upstream df702 17-byte (no-GPS) example input; expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary.

uplink.description: synthetic 17-byte frame, fire alarm + negative tilt angle
uplink._note: Synthetic no-GPS frame: level 800 mm, temp 18 C, sign byte low nibble != 0 -> negative tilt angle -12 deg (exercises the corrected sign logic; upstream always negates), fire flag set.

uplink.description: 25-byte parameter/config confirmation frame carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream command-confirmation example (bytes[3]==0x03). It carries device settings, not a measurement, so the normalized codec reports an error rather than emitting a measurement.
Synthetic short payload; not 17 or 25 bytes.
Synthetic frame on a non-3 FPort.
